title: Jungle Wood Loom
description: Alters the color of loom to resemble jungle wood.
body:
A simplistic texture pack that alters the loom's color to resemble jungle wood, making it more distinct when next other workstation blocks in the game. While the original color of the block isn't bad by any means, this pack offers an alternative for those that wish to make the game's features less oak-focused.


**Extra details**

- the zip file can just be dragged and dropped in your "resourcepacks" folder, unzipping isn't required;
- Optifine isn't required to use this pack.
